line_map.line: k is a ghost! knee… knot… know!
line_map.needs: ok ('know' has no dedicated image — abstract concept, acceptable-hold)

line_map.line: w is a ghost! write… wren… wrist!
line_map.needs: ok ('write' was never given an asset in the spec — acceptable-hold, hard to depict a verb)

line_map.line: b is a ghost! lamb… thumb… comb… climb!
A potato?! (NO!) P-p-potato! No ghost letters!
silent k… silent w… silent b… know! (we know it now!)

generate.mj_prompt: a simple wooden comb, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

line_map.line: The lamb can climb! Where is the lamb? Up on the rocks!
The lamb sees a wren. The wren can not climb.
The lamb has a knot! The lamb kneels down.
Now the lamb can climb! Up, up, to the top!
The lamb and the wren know the way!

wrong_art.issue: these 3 spreads use a shaggy tan-grey, longer-faced lamb design; spreads 3/6/7/8/9 (5 of 9 book pages) use a different white, curly, short-faced lamb design — the book's main character is visually inconsistent across its own pages
wrong_art.fix: reroll spreads 1/2/5 (lamb.png, lamb-climb.png, lamb-knot.png) to match the white curly-fleece lamb design used in the majority of the book: 'a small fluffy white curly-fleece lamb looking up, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw' (repeat with climbing/knot-nuzzling poses)

wrong_art.issue: background switches to a flat green cloth/rug instead of the outdoor rocky slope used in every neighboring spread
wrong_art.fix: reroll: 'a small white curly-fleece lamb kneeling on folded front legs on a dark rocky outdoor slope, working a rope knot loose with its teeth, patient, ultra-realistic photograph, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw'
